sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76518" key="paqikeu/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πᾰθῐκ-εύομαι</orth>, <sense id="n76518.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be sexually passive,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.73</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Nicarch.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
